The classification of Alsophila paraphysata places it within the kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. Further classification includes the order Cyatheales and family Cyatheaceae. Alsophila paraphysata is a relatively rare species that requires specific conditions to grow and propagate.
